subject: GRB 230814A: BALROG localization (Fermi Trigger 713732101 / GRB 230814788)
body:
B. Biltzinger, T. Preis, J. Burgess & J. Greiner (all MPE Garching) report:

The public trigdat data of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger
713732101 at 18:54:56 on 14 Aug. 2023 were automatically fitted for spectrum
and sky location with BALROG (Burgess et al. 2018, MNRAS 476, 1427;
Berlato et al. 2019, ApJ 873, 60).

The best-fit position (1 sigma statistical errors) is:
RA(2000.0) = 288.4+/-1.2 deg
Decl.(2000.0) = -12.0+/-1.3 deg
We estimate an additional systematic error of 1 deg.

Further details are available at:
https://grb.mpe.mpg.de/grb/GRB230814788/

The Healpix map can be downloaded from:
https://grb.mpe.mpg.de/grb/GRB230814788/healpix

The location parameters are available as JSON at:
https://grb.mpe.mpg.de/grb/GRB230814788/json
